name: Root package file untraced recommendation requires explicit risk framing
query: We want to untrace the root package.json in our monorepo.
context: The root package.json manages shared scripts and can influence package manager behavior across the repo.
expected_behavior: Calls out that root package files are high-risk untraced candidates
Suggests safer alternatives first when possible
success_criteria: The response does not present untracing the root package.json as a no-risk fix
The response includes the risk note in the main recommendation
